text:
Camp Tiger (キャンプタイガー, Kyanpu Taigā) is a species of tiger that impales its prey with its horn and uses fire to cook its food. It was discovered by Kite during a biological survey in the Kakin Empire. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 186 

Appearance

A Camp Tiger looks like an ordinary tiger, only that it has a long sharp, and narrow horn attached to its head that it uses to cook its prey on a fire. 

Behavior

Camp Tigers seem to be intelligent creatures, opting to use their horns and cook their food over a fire, implying that the tigers know how to start a fire.

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Banana claims it is one of the best finds on the Amateur Hunters biological survey. Spin details that it's a type of tiger that uses a campfire started by a bolt of lightning. According to Banana, even if Camp Tigers are Magical Beasts, it's the first known non-two-legged creature capable of using fire to cook raw meat.
